caribbean.headline: Caribbean Sees Gentle Winds
caribbean.paragraph: St. Thomas is experiencing gentle winds of 15 kt with significant wave heights of 5.8 ft, while San Juan is also seeing similar conditions with 15 kt winds. I expect these gentle winds and moderate waves to continue, with a 73% chance of rain in St. Thomas, making it the top impact port in the Eastern Caribbean today.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Storm Hits Marseille
mediterranean.paragraph: Marseille is experiencing strong winds of 25 kt and wave heights of 3.8 ft, with a high probability of rain at 95%. The SSE swell direction is also affecting nearby ports, although Cadiz in the Western Mediterranean is seeing relatively lighter conditions with max winds of 18 kt.
